ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Aap sabhi ko batana chahta hu ki hamara corporate VPN 20th April 2026 ko 02:00 AM se 04:00 AM IST tak maintenance ke liye offline rahega. Is period mein sabhi VPN connections unavailable honge.

To avoid any disruption, kindly:
1. Apna kaam save karein aur 01:45 AM IST se pehle VPN se log out ho jayein.
2. Agar maintenance ke baad bhi koi issue aaye, to VPN credentials reset karein ya IT helpdesk (ithelp@company.com) se sampark karein.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best Regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Resolve Your FedEx/DHL Delivery Fee Now
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Aapka recent shipment FedEx/DHL se miss ho gaya hai. Iske karan aapke account mein INR 1499 ka additional fee add ho gaya hai. Yeh fee 48 ghante ke andar pay karna jaruri hai, warna shipment cancel ho jayega.

To pay, please click <URL>.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
FedEx Customer Support
